MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Olopernes; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff John B. Vlahos is present.
Attorney Eugene Alexander Vlahos appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Guillermo David Chavez is present.
Attorney Amy Nielsen representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Deb Schweizer, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of APR-8-2013 is vacated. (501/JPT)
